construct_threats: Printed Q1–Q7 (survey + demographics) and Likert items are descriptive_only; must not infer competence.
leakage_risks: Demographic items (B6–B7, L12) must never enter behaviour or ILO inference.
evidence_limitations: Only cognitive scored items (B8a, B8b, B9, Q10, Q11, Q12) produce behaviour evidence.
Q1–Q5 (B1–B5) and Q6–Q7 (B6–B7) have no keyed correct answers — store verbatim only.
